Name: DBZ–AfDB On-Lending Facility (USD 100 million) – SME & Agri Programme
Description: On-lending credit line from the African Development Bank (AfDB) to Development Bank of Zambia for on-lending to Zambian SMEs and agri-businesses. AfDB loan ref ADB/ZM/DBZ/2022/001. GRZ on-lent to DBZ at 5.5% p.a. for 15-year term. DBZ on-lends at 12–16% to final borrowers. Disbursed through DBZ regional branches in Lusaka, Kitwe, Livingstone and Chipata.

Name: DBZ–World Bank IDA Line of Credit – SME Financing Programme
Description: IDA credit line channelled through GRZ to DBZ for SME working capital and equipment financing. World Bank project P178234 – Zambia SME Finance & Recovery Support. Term: 20 years, 0.75% service fee, 10-year grace period. Disbursed to DBZ clients in manufacturing, agri-processing, tourism and green economy sectors. Total committed: USD 80M. MOF ref MOF-WB-DBZ-2023.

Name: DBZ–EIB Infrastructure Credit Line (EUR 60 million)
Description: European Investment Bank (EIB) long-term credit line to DBZ for infrastructure project financing in energy, water, transport and urban development. EIB loan agreement EIB/ZM/2023/0034. Term: 25 years, 6-year grace period, EIB benchmark rate + 1.5% margin. First tranche: EUR 30M committed to Kafue Flats Irrigation Scheme and Lusaka Water Treatment Plant expansions.

Name: DBZ–China Exim Bank Concessional Facility (USD 50 million)
Description: Concessional loan from China Export-Import Bank to DBZ for on-lending to Zambian manufacturing enterprises under the FOCAC Development Finance framework. China Exim ref CEXIM/ZM/DBZ/2021/0023. Rate: 2% p.a., 20-year term, 5-year grace. Committed to Special Economic Zone manufacturers in Lusaka South MFEZ and Chambishi MFEZ. GRZ guarantee.

Name: DBZ–USAID DCA Partial Guarantee (USD 30 million ceiling)
Description: USAID Development Credit Authority (DCA) partial guarantee covering 50% of principal loss on DBZ loans to women-owned SMEs, agri-SMEs and climate-smart businesses. DCA agreement USAID/ZM/DCA/2022/002. Guarantee ceiling: USD 30M. Mobilises DBZ lending at reduced rates (3% reduction vs standard rate) to 1,800 qualifying enterprises. USAID/Zambia mission ref USM-ZM-DBZ-2022.

Name: DBZ GRZ Sovereign On-Lending Guarantee – Agriculture & Agri-Processing
Description: Government of Zambia sovereign guarantee backing DBZ's agricultural sector portfolio (ZMW 1.8 billion outstanding). Guarantee issued under Loans and Guarantees (Authorisation) Act. Covers DBZ loans to commercial farmers, co-operatives and agri-processors under the E-Voucher Agri Finance Programme. MOF guarantee ref MOF-SG-AGRI-0034. Annual MOF review required.

Name: DBZ–KfW Development Bank SME Finance Facility (EUR 25 million)
Description: KfW Development Bank (Germany) credit line to DBZ for green economy and climate-smart SME financing. KfW loan KFW/ZM/DBZ/2024/001. 20-year term, 5% all-in rate. First disbursement focuses on agri-SMEs in Eastern and Southern provinces adopting climate-smart agriculture (conservation farming, drip irrigation). GRZ back-to-back guarantee. EUR 5M grant component for technical assistance.

Name: DBZ Development Bond 2021A (ZMW 1.2 billion) – LuSE Listed
Description: 10-year development finance bond, Coupon 13.25% p.a. LuSE-listed. First DBZ bond post-restructuring. Proceeds on-lent to SMEs, agri-enterprises and infrastructure projects across Zambia's 10 provinces. Rating: Fitch BB– (Zambia sovereign). GRZ full faith guarantee. SECZ prospectus approval SEC/ZB/2021/0045. Proceeds also finance Lusaka East Industrial Park infrastructure.

Name: DBZ Development Bond 2022A (ZMW 1.5 billion) – Infrastructure Focus
Description: 8-year infrastructure bond, Coupon 14.0% p.a. Proceeds exclusively finance physical infrastructure: water, sanitation, urban roads, industrial parks and irrigation schemes approved under the National Infrastructure Investment Plan (NIIP). LuSE-listed. SECZ ref SEC/ZB/2022/0056. Moody's: Ba3 outlook stable. GRZ guarantee.

Name: DBZ Development Bond 2023A (ZMW 980 million)
Description: 6-year bond, Coupon 15.5% p.a. Proceeds directed to SME Working Capital Refinancing Facility post-COVID-19 recovery support. 1,200 qualifying SMEs in manufacturing, services and agriculture. LuSE-listed. SECZ ref SEC/ZB/2023/0034. CEEC and ZDA co-financing partnership. GRZ guarantee.

Name: DBZ Green Development Bond 2024 (ZMW 750 million) – CBI Certified
Description: 7-year green bond certified by the Climate Bonds Initiative (CBI) – Agriculture, Land Use and Forestry category. Coupon 14.5% p.a. Proceeds finance climate-smart agri-lending: conservation farming, solar irrigation, REDD+ forestry projects and climate-resilient infrastructure. LuSE-listed. SECZ ref SEC/ZGB/2024/0008. ZEMA environmental assurance sign-off.

Name: DBZ Agricultural Development Bond 2024 (ZMW 850 million)
Description: 9-year sectoral bond for agricultural value-chain financing: seed multiplication, fertiliser supply chains, agro-processing, cold storage and grain silos. Coupon 15.0% p.a. LuSE-listed. Partnership with FRA, NAMBOARD and FISP programme. SECZ ref SEC/ZB/2024/0039. Targets 4,200 commercial and emerging farmers across Eastern, Southern and Central provinces.

Name: DBZ Lusaka East Industrial Park Revenue Bond (ZMW 420 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by factory shell and industrial land lease revenues from Lusaka East Industrial Park (LEIP). 120-ha park: 45 factory units, 12 warehouses, utilities infrastructure. Annual lease revenue: ZMW 85M from 38 tenant companies in manufacturing, agri-processing and logistics. DSCR: 1.6×. INDECO/DBZ co-ownership. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2022/0019.

Name: DBZ Kafue Flats Irrigation Scheme Revenue Bond (ZMW 580 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by irrigation service fee revenues from the 14,000-ha Kafue Flats Irrigation Scheme (KFIS), Southern Province. Annual service fees from 850 registered irrigators: ZMW 128M. World Bank Irrigation Development Project co-financing (IDA credit IDA-0567-ZM). DSCR: 1.4×. LWSC water abstraction licence LAL-2021-004.

Name: DBZ Lusaka South MFEZ Revenue Bond (ZMW 680 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by developer fee, lease and utility revenues from Lusaka South Multi-Facility Economic Zone (LS-MFEZ). Zone has 250+ registered companies, annual lease revenues: ZMW 165M. MFEZ developer: IDC/Zambia-China Economic and Trade Cooperation Zone. DSCR: 1.7×. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2023/0031.

Name: DBZ Northern Corridor Roads Revenue Bond (ZMW 490 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by projected toll revenues from the Great North Road (Lusaka–Kapiri Mposhi–Kabwe) under the Northern Corridor Upgrading project. DBZ provides bridge financing to RNIP (Road Network Improvement Programme). Toll revenue forecast: ZMW 110M/yr from Year 2. DSCR: 1.5×. ZNRA agreement ref ZNRA-TOLL-2024/003. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2024/0016.

Name: DBZ SME Industrial Hub Revenue Bond – Copperbelt (ZMW 320 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by lease and utility revenues from Kitwe SME Industrial Hub (120 factory units). Annual revenue: ZMW 72M from metal fabrication, automotive, plastics and food processing tenants. DBZ anchor financing: ZMW 220M. CEEC equity participation: ZMW 80M. Copperbelt Development Foundation co-sponsor. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2024/0024.

Name: DBZ Equity Token – GRZ 100% Government Holding
Description: Tokenised equity representing Government of Zambia's 100% ownership of Development Bank of Zambia. DBZ total assets: ZMW 8.6B (Q4 2024 audited). Net equity: ZMW 2.1B. DBZ statutory mandate: long-term development finance per the Development Bank of Zambia Act No. 33 of 1972 (as amended). MOF oversight authority.

Name: DBZ Portfolio Equity – Livingstone Tourism Infrastructure PPP
Description: Tokenised equity representing DBZ's 30% strategic stake in the Livingstone Tourism Infrastructure Development Company (LTIDC) – operator of the Mosi-oa-Tunya Tourism SEZ. JV partners: DBZ (30%), Ministry of Tourism (25%), ZPSF (20%), Private Tourism Consortium (25%). Annual tourism revenue base: ZMW 480M. DBZ governance appointment: 2 board seats.

Name: DBZ Portfolio Equity – ZAFFICO Forestry Commercial Development (25% stake)
Description: Tokenised equity representing DBZ's 25% strategic stake in Zambia Forestry and Forest Industries Corporation (ZAFFICO) commercial pine and eucalyptus plantation operations – 62,000 ha across Northern and Copperbelt provinces. DBZ invested ZMW 280M in 2019 restructuring. Annual timber and pulp revenue: ZMW 340M. ZAFFICO IDC ref IDC-ZAFFICO-2024.

Name: DBZ Portfolio Equity – Mpongwe Rice Irrigation Scheme (40% stake)
Description: Tokenised equity representing DBZ's 40% stake in Mpongwe Rice Irrigation Scheme (MRIS) development company – 4,800-ha irrigated rice and wheat scheme in Copperbelt Province. JV: DBZ (40%), Mpongwe District Council (20%), Private Agri-Investors (40%). DBZ anchor finance: ZMW 320M. Target annual rice production: 28,000 MT from Year 3.

Name: DBZ PPP Token – Lusaka East Industrial Park Phase II
Description: PPP token for the DBZ-led Lusaka East Industrial Park Phase II: 85-ha expansion with 60 new factory shells, shared utilities (solar 5 MW, water treatment), and SME incubator hub. Private co-developer: Mota-Engil Africa and TATA Africa Holdings. ZPPA approval ZPPA/PPP/DBZ/2024/007. DBZ anchor finance: ZMW 380M. GRZ land contribution: 85 ha state land.

Name: DBZ PPP Token – Chipata Multi-Facility Economic Zone
Description: PPP token for the Chipata MFEZ development: 200-ha economic zone adjacent to Zambia–Malawi Mchinji Border Post. DBZ co-developer with China Civil Engineering Construction Corporation (CCECC). MFEZ designated by MCCI under Multi-Facility Economic Zones Act. Targets agri-processing, textiles, light manufacturing and warehousing. DBZ anchor: ZMW 280M. COMESA preferential trade zone.

Name: DBZ PPP Token – Kafue Flats Irrigation Scheme Phase II Expansion
Description: PPP token for the 8,000-ha Kafue Flats Irrigation Phase II expansion on the Kafue Plain, Southern Province. DBZ co-developer with Government of Israel (through Mekorot) and Zambia Sugar (Illovo Group). Phase II targets smallholder sugar cane, wheat and maize under out-grower schemes. World Bank IDA co-financing USD 65M. DBZ anchor: ZMW 350M. ZPPA ref ZPPA/PPP/AGRI/2024/003.

Name: DBZ PPP Token – Digital Infrastructure & Fintech Acceleration Fund
Description: PPP token for the DBZ-led Zambia Digital Infrastructure and Fintech Acceleration Fund: USD 25M blended finance facility co-funded with IFC, UNCDF and AfDB. Targets Zambian fintech startups, digital payment infrastructure, AgriFintech and climate-risk insurance platforms. DBZ equity contribution: ZMW 180M. SECZ VC licence pending. Smart Zambia endorsement ref SZI/FINTECH/2025/001.
